summary: Iteration 64 - LocalizedField for Contact Settings, General Settings, and Blog Summary HTML. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: BlogManager summary is RichTextEditor with LocalizedField, ContactSettingsManager has 7 fields with EN/ES tabs, SettingsManager General tab has 6 localized fields. Fixed critical bug: ContactSection in HomePage.js was not using tt() for localized contact settings, causing React error when switching to ES.
critical_code_review_comments: ContactSettingsManager.js: All 7 fields (title, subtitle, description, name_placeholder, email_placeholder, message_placeholder, submit_text) wrapped with LocalizedField - shows EN/ES tabs
SettingsManager.js General tab: 6 fields (brand_name, tagline, meta_title, meta_description, footer_description, footer_copyright) wrapped with LocalizedField
BlogManager.js: Summary field changed from textarea to RichTextEditor inside LocalizedField
NewsPage.js: Summary rendered as HTML via dangerouslySetInnerHTML with line-clamp-3 styling; uses tt() on title and summary
NewsDetailPage.js: Summary rendered as italic intro block before content; uses tt() on title/summary/content
Footer.js: Uses tt() for brand_name, footer_description, footer_copyright
Navbar.js: All 3 navbars (Default, Modern/Aurex, Classic) use tt() on brand_name/tagline
admin_tools.py: Updated update_contact_settings to save all 7 fields (was only saving 3)
seed_data_creation: Created test contact settings with EN/ES values via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 verified LocalizedField for Contact Settings (7 fields), General Settings (6 fields), and Blog Summary HTML rendering. Key findings: (1) BlogManager summary is now RichTextEditor with LocalizedField; (2) NewsPage renders summary as HTML with line-clamp-3; (3) NewsDetailPage renders summary as italic intro block; (4) All contact settings fields have EN/ES tabs; (5) Footer and Navbar correctly use tt() for localized settings. Fixed bug: ContactSection in HomePage.js was not using tt() for contact settings.

backend: PUT /api/admin/contact-settings accepts and persists all 7 localized fields
GET /api/admin/contact-settings returns all 7 fields with localized values
PUT /api/admin/settings accepts localized dict for brand_name, tagline, meta_*, footer_*
POST /api/admin/blog accepts HTML summary with localized values
GET /api/public/blog returns posts with HTML summary intact
GET /api/public/blog/{slug} returns post with HTML summary
Legacy plain-string values still work (backwards compatibility)
frontend: BlogManager: Summary field is RichTextEditor inside LocalizedField with EN/ES tabs
ContactSettingsManager: 7 fields with LocalizedField showing EN/ES tabs
SettingsManager General tab: 6 fields with LocalizedField showing EN/ES tabs
NewsPage: Blog cards show summary as HTML with line-clamp-3 styling
NewsDetailPage: Summary rendered as italic intro block above content
Language switcher works correctly - switching to ES shows Spanish content
Footer shows localized footer_description and footer_copyright
Navbar shows localized brand_name and tagline

bugs_fixed.issue: React error 'Objects are not valid as a React child' when switching to ES language
bugs_fixed.root_cause: ContactSection in HomePage.js was directly using cs.title, cs.subtitle, cs.description without tt() translation helper
bugs_fixed.fix: Added useT import and wrapped contact settings fields with tt() in ContactSection

bugs_fixed.issue: Backend contact-settings endpoint only saved 3 fields instead of 7
bugs_fixed.root_cause: update_contact_settings in admin_tools.py only extracted title, subtitle, description
bugs_fixed.fix: Added name_placeholder, email_placeholder, message_placeholder, submit_text to the saved fields
